matched_strings: SELECT d1.LeafName as LeafName, d1.Id as Id, dbo.fn_GetFullUrl(d1.DirName, d1.LeafName) as Url,  d1.FolderChildCount as FolderChildCount, d1.ListId as ListId, p1.Acl as Acl, p1.AnonymousPermMask as AnonymousPermMask  FROM TVF_Docs_Site(?) as d1  CROSS APPLY TVF_Perms_ScopeId(d1.SiteId, d1.ScopeId) as p1  WHERE d1.Type = 1 AND d1.SortBehavior = 1 AND d1.DocLibRowId IS NOT NULL  AND d1.Level = 1  ORDER BY d1.LeafName  OPTION (MAXDOP 1, FORCE ORDER)
